isolation.type: Rust unit tests on host machine

steps.expected: Prompt sent with extracted text, response contains session/thread ID from system/init
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts result["id"] == "droid-acp-sess-42", result["thread_id"] == "droid-acp-sess-42", and output contains "Hello Droid!"

steps.expected: Text extracted from 'content' field of params
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts output contains "Direct content"

steps.expected: Text extracted from 'text' field of params
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts output contains "Text field content"

steps.expected: Error returned when no text found in params
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts RpcError::Deserialization with message containing "no text found"

steps.expected: Synthetic ID returned when no system/init received
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts result has string "id" and "thread_id" fields

assertions.title: turn/start maps to Droid prompt (no re-initialization)

steps.expected: Prompt sent with extracted text from items array, returns null
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts result is null and output contains "Follow-up message"

steps.expected: Exactly one message sent to transport (no init or session creation)
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts exactly 1 non-empty line in output containing the prompt text
Test passed — asserts result is null

steps.expected: No output written to Droid transport for interrupt
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts captured output is empty after interrupt

assertions.title: thread/list returns current session or empty

steps.expected: Returns empty threads array before init
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts threads array is empty

steps.expected: Returns single thread with session ID from system/init
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts threads array has 1 entry with id == "sess-list-42"

steps.expected: Returns empty threads array when no init received
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts threads array is empty

steps.expected: Returns {"ok": true} without sending message to Droid transport
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts result["ok"] == true and output does not contain "user_message"

regression.description: Existing prompt and cancel methods still work after method mapping additions

tests.name: droid_acp_codex_unknown_method_returns_error
tests.detail: Asserts RpcError::Server with code -32601 and method name in message

summary: Tested 6 assertions (VAL-DROIDACP-MAP-001 through VAL-DROIDACP-MAP-006): all 6 passed. 19 droid_acp_codex tests ran successfully (0 failed). 2 additional regression tests (existing prompt/cancel methods) also passed. 1 unknown method test confirmed -32601 error code. Total: 21 tests, 21 passed, 0 failed.
